diagnosis.title: Compliance Diagnosis

esg.title: Full-Cycle ESG Management
esg.desc: AI industry-adapted ESG data collection, system planning, automated report generation, and compliance review

decision.title: Go-Global Decision Engine
decision.desc: Multi-dimensional scoring, intelligent recommendation of optimal destinations, complete go-global mode and pathway decision plans

solution.title: Solution Tools
solution.desc: AI auto-generates actionable compliance solutions and documents based on diagnosis and decision results, with team collaboration

analysis.title: Data Visualization Analytics
analysis.desc: Enterprise-exclusive dashboard with comprehensive visualization of compliance progress, risk indices, ESG scores, and industry benchmarks

expert.title: Expert Consulting
expert.desc: Professional expert team covering go-global compliance, ESG management, and cross-border tax, with online consultation and appointment

resource.title: Resource Matching Platform
resource.desc: Integrating overseas law firms, accounting firms, ESG agencies, cross-border service providers for precise matching

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to Go-Global Compliance Decision
howItWorks.subtitle: From information input to solution delivery, AI-assisted throughout for faster and more accurate decisions

step1.title: Input Company Information
step1.desc: Fill in company basics, target markets, and business type; platform intelligently matches applicable regulations and ESG standards

step2.title: AI Intelligent Diagnosis
step2.desc: LLM automatically completes compliance diagnosis, risk assessment, and ESG analysis, generating detailed reports and recommendations

step3.title: Generate Actionable Solutions
step3.desc: Based on diagnosis results, one-click generation of customized compliance plans, ESG system setup, and go-global roadmaps

featuredCases.title: Featured Case Studies
featuredCases.subtitle: Real enterprise go-global practices, distilling reusable methodologies and insights

chat.title: AI Consulting
chat.subtitle: Go-Global Compliance & ESG Expert
chat.placeholder: Ask your question, e.g., How can my AI product enter the European market while complying with the EU AI Act?
chat.loginRequired: Please log in to use the AI consulting feature
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm HQ (HaiWen), your professional consultant for AI globalization and ESG innovation.
chat.welcomeDesc: I can help you develop AI product go-global strategies and market entry paths, analyze target market regulatory compliance and risks, interpret EU AI Act, GDPR and other international regulations, design ESG sustainability plans, and understand international competitive landscape and opportunities.
chat.suggestion1: What specific compliance requirements does the EU AI Act have for my AI product?
chat.suggestion2: What are the ESG disclosure requirements in Southeast Asian AI markets?
chat.suggestion3: What steps does a Chinese AI company need to enter the European market?
chat.suggestion4: How do I build an ESG data management system compliant with ISSB standards?
chat.error: Failed to get response. Please check your connection and retry.
chat.noKey: AI service not configured. Please contact the administrator.
